name: Serpstat SEO Platform API
what_it_does: Serpstat REST API for comprehensive SEO data including keyword research, rank tracking, SERP analysis, and competitor intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage keyword research and search volume data for content strategy automation, handle rank tracking and SERP position monitoring for SEO performance, access competitor analysis and domain analytics for competitive intelligence, retrieve backlink data and referring domain analysis for link building automation, manage site audit and technical SEO data for on-page optimization, handle PPC and paid search data for cross-channel keyword strategy, access search trend data for editorial calendar planning, retrieve local SERP data for local SEO automation, manage bulk keyword clustering for content architecture, and integrate Serpstat with SEO platforms, CMS, and marketing analytics systems.
use_cases: Researching keywords from content strategy agents
Tracking rank changes from SEO monitoring agents
Analyzing competitor domains from competitive intelligence agents
Clustering keywords from content architecture agents
not_for: Real-time rank tracking without delay tolerance
Direct Google Search Console integration (use official API)
Non-SEO marketing analytics without search focus
best_when: An SEO agency, content marketing team, or digital publisher wanting AI agents to automate keyword research, rank tracking, competitor SERP analysis, and content gap identification at scale.
avoid_when: GOOGLE TERMS OF SERVICE RISK: Serpstat SERP data is collected via scraping; commercial use of scraped SERP data must be evaluated against Google ToS prohibiting automated access; review ToS compliance for your specific use case. Credit/API unit consumption — Serpstat uses API unit credit system; automated agents without query budget controls can rapidly consume credits; implement strict unit budgets and rate limiting. Data freshness — SERP data reflects scraping timing, not real-time results; rank tracking data may be hours to days stale; time-sensitive SEO decisions must account for freshness lag.

auth.notes: Serpstat uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Odessa, Ukraine HQ (founded 2013). Private. API unit credit system. 800,000+ users. All-in-one SEO platform. Competes with SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Moz for SEO data. Post-2022 operations continued from international offices.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial with limited API units; paid plans include API unit allowances
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly/annual subscription; API units included per plan tier
pricing.notes: Odessa, Ukraine origin. Founded 2013. Private. 800K+ users. SEO platform. Credit-based API access. Competes with SEMrush and Ahrefs.

performance.rate_limits: API unit-based rate limiting; concurrent request limits per API key

known_agent_gotchas: GOOGLE ToS COMPLIANCE: Serpstat SERP data is scraped; commercial automated use must be evaluated against Google ToS; review legal position before building production workflows on Serpstat SERP data

API unit depletion — Serpstat credit system creates cost exposure for automated agents; bulk keyword research without unit budgets can exhaust monthly allowance rapidly; implement per-session unit caps
No webhooks — rank tracking and report completion require polling; no push notification for tracking event completion
Data freshness lag — keyword volume and SERP position data has inherent scraping delay; automated decisions on time-sensitive SEO events must account for data age
Ukraine operations continuity — Serpstat operations were affected post-2022 conflict; verify current infrastructure stability and data freshness guarantees for production workflows
Keyword volume rounding — search volume data uses rounded buckets (100, 200, 500, 1000, etc.); automated content prioritization based on exact volume comparisons within same bucket is unreliable
agent_readiness.security_notes: SEO data. GDPR. API key. EU. SERP and keyword data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SEO platform. GDPR. API key. EU. Keyword and SERP data.
